title: Teams
description: Simple Paper Plugin that allows players to create and join teams.
body:
Simple Teams is a lightweight Paper plugin for Minecraft 1.21.1 that lets players create, join, and manage teams with ease. Designed to be simple, fast, and flexible, it’s perfect for SMPs, events, and semi-technical servers that want team mechanics without the bloat.

Players can create and delete teams, join existing ones, and choose custom team colors. The plugin integrates cleanly with MiniMessage for modern text formatting and PlaceholderAPI for easy compatibility with scoreboards, chat plugins, and other server tools.
